---
name: Documentation
about: Request documentation improvements or report documentation issues
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue

A clear and concise description of the documentation issue or improvement needed.

## Type of Documentation

- [ ] User guide
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Technical documentation
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] README updates
- [ ] Installation instructions
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide

## Current State

Describe the current state of the documentation (if any):

## Proposed Changes

Describe what changes or additions you'd like to see:

## Target Audience

Who is the primary audience for this documentation?

- [ ] End users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] System administrators

## Location

Where should this documentation be located?

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] docs/guides/
- [ ] docs/technical/
- [ ] docs/specifications/
- [ ] Inline code comments
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Priority

- [ ] High (blocking for users/developers)
- [ ] Medium (would improve experience)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or references that might be helpful.
